email_subject: Application for Office Assistant – Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Office Assistant position at Michael Page International (Belgium) in Leuven, as advertised. With a background in digital marketing and web development, I have developed strong organizational, administrative, and communication skills that I believe align well with the responsibilities of this role.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage multiple projects simultaneously, coordinate with teams, and ensure timely delivery of content and website updates. I am accustomed to handling administrative tasks such as scheduling, email management, and vendor coordination. Additionally, I have experience supporting HR-related processes, including onboarding and training coordination, through my work with interns and new team members.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, with a working knowledge of Dutch (A2, currently studying). I am based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am eager to bring my proactive, detail-oriented approach to your team in Leuven.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to your organization.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Office Assistant position at Michael Page International (Belgium) in Leuven. With a strong foundation in digital marketing, web development, and project coordination, I have developed the organizational, administrative, and communication skills necessary to support a dynamic media company.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage multiple client projects, coordinate content calendars, and ensure seamless communication between teams. I handle scheduling, email management, and vendor coordination, which has honed my ability to prioritize tasks and maintain a professional workflow. I also support HR-related activities, including onboarding new team members and coordinating training sessions, demonstrating my capability to manage administrative processes effectively.

My technical background includes building and maintaining websites using WordPress, Elementor, and Astra, which has given me a keen eye for detail and problem-solving. I am comfortable assisting with IT-related queries and have experience managing digital tools and platforms. Additionally, I have organized internal events and initiatives, such as team workshops and social activities, fostering a collaborative and positive work environment.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, with a working knowledge of Dutch (A2, currently studying). I am based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am eager to bring my proactive, adaptable, and service-oriented mindset to your team in Leuven.

Thank you for considering my application. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills and enthusiasm can contribute to your organization.

Warm regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

Managed daily office operations, vendor coordination, and facility follow-up in a remote work environment.
Supported management with scheduling, meeting coordination, and administrative follow-up.
Coordinated HR-related administration including onboarding, training, and intern management.
Handled general mailbox and phone line management, ensuring professional communication.
Assisted with IT-related queries and organized internal events and well-being initiatives.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Office & administrative management: daily office operations, vendor coordination, facility follow-up, general mailbox and phone line management, scheduling, meeting coordination, HR administration (onboarding, training, intern management), event organization
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
